sentences.text: Thad and Theo had a thin raptor and the fossil.
A thin predator met Thad and Theo on the path.
Thad fed a thin raptor and Theo got the predator.
Theo and Thad set a thin armor with the predator.
A swift thin raptor hid with Thad, Theo, and Beth.
Thad and Theo dug a thin dorsal at the path.
A thin predator ran with Thad, Theo, and Seth.
Theo had a thin raptor and Thad had the predator.
Thad and Theo met a thin dorsal in the shed.
A swift thin predator ran with Thad and Theo.
Thad let Theo dig a thin fossil with Beth.
Theo got a thin dorsal and Thad got the herd.
Thad and Theo had a thin raptor and a moth.
A thin armor sat with Thad, Theo, and Seth.
Thad fed a thin predator and Theo had the egg.
Theo and Thad got a thin predator at the shed.
A swift thin raptor sat with Thad and Theo.
Thad and Theo set a thin herd with the dorsal.
A thin raptor ran past Thad with Theo and Beth.
Thad got a thin raptor and Theo met the predator.
